an5.194:1.1:
1
On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Vesālī in the hall with the peaked roof in the Great Wood. Now on that occasion the brahmin Kāraṇapālī was getting some work done for the Licchavis.
The brahmin Kāraṇapālī saw the brahmin Piṅgiyānī
coming in the distance and said to him:
an5.194:2.1:
2
"Where is Master Piṅgiyānī coming from in the middle of the day?"
an5.194:2.2: "I am coming, sir, from the presence of the ascetic Gotama."
an5.194:2.3: "What do you think of the ascetic Gotama's competence in wisdom? Do you consider him wise?"
